name: Juicy Florida Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 1 gallon non-metal container.
2. Mix well.
3. Pour into a Dutch oven or kettle.
4. Cook over low heat until the mixture begins to thicken.
5. If needed, add more cornstarch to thin the sauce.
6. When cool, pour into squeeze bottles with large holes in the tip.
7. Makes 1 1/2 Quarts
